content.claim: The 6- and 8-year gimnazium tracks are geographically concentrated in Budapest and a few regional centers, not evenly distributed: Budapest hosts multiple elite early-selective schools ranking in the national top tier, while only one rural school (Lovassy László Gimnazium in Veszprém) appears consistently in top-10 national rankings across multiple years.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: School rankings reflect academic prestige rather than network coverage or transport feasibility
The single rural entry in top-10 may reflect ranking methodology bias toward well-resourced schools rather than absence of other rural capacity
No quantified count of 6-/8-year places by settlement size is provided
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
